title: Submission/random linear maps lora
author: austinluk

data.description: Uses grouped query attention with 4 KV heads.
Adds low-rank adapters to each linear layer on top of a frozen random base weight.
Frozen backbone weights are deterministically generated from a seed and used as random projections.

novel_contributions: Uses a frozen random backbone regenerated from a deterministic seed, so the backbone costs 0 bytes in the artifact.
Trains only small LoRA-style adapters plus embeddings, norms, and control parameters.
Serializes only the trainable subset and reconstructs the full model at load time from the seed.
Applies int8 plus zlib compression to the saved trainable parameters.
Proposes a large random-feature backbone as an alternative to standard train-then-compress approaches.
